StructUI is a React component registry and docs system for reusable UI primitives and higher-level blocks.

Canonical package: struct-ui
Canonical CLI: npx strui
Registry URL: https://structui.com/registry.json
GitHub: https://github.com/structui/structui

Metrics: 56 total components, 3 documented, 56 stable, 8 categories.

Component index:
- 3d-pin: 3D Pin (Advanced, stable) - 3D Pin: Interactive 3D hover card for standout links and showcases.
- accordion: Accordion (Data Display, stable) - Use Accordion for FAQs, settings panels, and dense content sections. Supports single or multiple expanded items and keyboard navigation.
- alert: Alert (Feedback, stable) - Alert: Inline status and warning messaging.
- alert-dialog: Alert Dialog (Overlay, stable) - Alert Dialog: High-stakes confirmation dialog for destructive actions.
- aspect-ratio: Aspect Ratio (Layout, stable) - Aspect Ratio: Constrain media and embeds to a fixed aspect ratio.
- avatar: Avatar (Data Display, stable) - Avatar: Profile image primitive with fallback states.
- badge: Badge (General, stable) - Use Badge to communicate status, category, or small metadata labels. Suitable for filters, labels, and inline semantic emphasis.
- bento-grid: Bento Grid (Layout, stable) - Bento Grid: Editorial grid layout for feature sections and dashboards.
- breadcrumbs: Breadcrumbs (Navigation, stable) - Breadcrumbs: Hierarchy-based navigation trail for nested pages.
- button: Button (General, stable) - Use Button for primary and secondary actions. Supports variants, sizes, icons, loading states, and polymorphic rendering via asChild.
- calendar: Calendar (Data Display, stable) - Calendar: Date and schedule UI for picking and browsing dates.
- card: Card (Layout, stable) - Card: Flexible container for grouped content, metadata, and actions.
- charts: Charts (Data Display, stable) - Charts: Composable chart components for visualizing trends and distributions.
- checkbox: Checkbox (Forms, stable) - Checkbox: Binary input for multi-select and consent flows.
- combobox: Combobox (Forms, stable) - Combobox: Searchable selection UI for larger option sets.
- command-palette: Command Palette (Advanced, stable) - Command Palette: Keyboard-driven search and action launcher.
- context-menu: Context Menu (Overlay, stable) - Context Menu: Right-click menu for contextual actions.
- cookies-banner: Cookies Banner (Overlay, stable) - Cookies Banner: Consent banner for privacy and cookie preferences.
- data-table-advanced: Data Table Advanced (Data Display, stable) - Data Table Advanced: Feature-rich table with sorting, filtering, and large dataset support.
- device-mockups: Device Mockups (Layout, stable) - Device Mockups: Device frames for product previews across desktop and mobile form factors.
- dialogs: Dialogs (Overlay, stable) - Dialogs: Modal flows for auth, confirmation, and focused interaction.
- dropdown-menu: Dropdown Menu (Overlay, stable) - Dropdown Menu: Action menu for compact contextual choices.
- file-upload: File Upload (Forms, stable) - File Upload: Drag-and-drop upload field for files and attachments.
- hero: Hero (Advanced, stable) - Hero: Landing page hero section for high-impact product messaging.
- hover-card: Hover Card (Overlay, stable) - Hover Card: Preview card shown on hover for linked entities and metadata.
- input: Input (Forms, stable) - Input: Standard text input field for forms and filters.
- input-otp: Input OTP (Forms, stable) - Input OTP: Segmented one-time password input for auth flows.
- input-tag: Input Tag (Forms, stable) - Input Tag: Tag entry input for labels, recipients, and multi-value fields.
- kanban: Kanban (Data Display, stable) - Kanban: Board-style workflow layout for task and pipeline management.
- loaders: Loaders & Spinners (General, stable) - Loaders & Spinners: Animated loading indicators for async states and pending screens.
- markdown-editor: Markdown Editor (Forms, stable) - Markdown Editor: Markdown editor with live preview for content workflows.
- menubar: Menubar (Navigation, stable) - Menubar: Desktop-style application menu bar.
- navigation-menu: Navigation Menu (Navigation, stable) - Navigation Menu: Advanced site navigation menus for headers and mega menus.
- pagination: Pagination (Navigation, stable) - Pagination: Paging controls for list and table navigation.
- popover: Popover (Overlay, stable) - Popover: Floating panel anchored to a trigger element.
- pricing: Pricing (Data Display, stable) - Pricing: Pricing cards and plan comparison layouts.
- progress: Progress (Feedback, stable) - Progress: Progress indicators for uploads, steps, and async work.
- radio-group: Radio Group (Forms, stable) - Radio Group: Single-selection input for mutually exclusive choices.
- scroll-area: Scroll Area (Layout, stable) - Scroll Area: Styled scroll container for overflow-heavy content.
- select: Select (Forms, stable) - Select: Dropdown selection menu for predefined options.
- separator: Separator (Layout, stable) - Separator: Visual divider for grouping content and actions.
- sheet: Sheet (Overlay, stable) - Sheet: Slide-over panel for secondary flows and contextual tasks.
- skeleton: Skeleton (Data Display, stable) - Skeleton: Loading placeholder blocks for content still in flight.
- slider: Slider (Forms, stable) - Slider: Range input for numeric selection and tuning.
- spinner: Spinner (Feedback, stable) - Spinner: Compact loading spinner for buttons and small placeholders.
- stats: Stats (Data Display, stable) - Stats: Metric cards and summary layouts for dashboards.
- stepper: Stepper (Navigation, stable) - Stepper: Step-based progress indicator for multi-stage flows.
- switch: Switch (Forms, stable) - Switch: Toggle control for on/off settings.
- table: Table (Data Display, stable) - Table: Standard table primitives for structured data.
- tabs: Tabs (Navigation, stable) - Tabs: Tabbed navigation for switching between related content panels.
- textarea: Textarea (Forms, stable) - Textarea: Multiline text field for messages, notes, and descriptions.
- timeline: Timeline (Data Display, stable) - Timeline: Sequential activity and event display for history-heavy screens.
- toast: Toast (Feedback, stable) - Toast: Transient notification system for success, error, and info messages.
- toggle: Toggle (Forms, stable) - Toggle: Pressed-state control for compact option toggles.
- tooltip: Tooltip (Overlay, stable) - Tooltip: Short contextual hint shown on hover or focus.
- typography: Typography (General, stable) - Typography: Type styles and content patterns for structured text layouts.
